mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_order (order_no, user_id, product_id, quantity, total_price, status) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{productId}, #{quantity}, #{totalPrice}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM t_order WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE t_order SET status = #{status} WHERE order_no = #{orderNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_outbox_message (topic, payload, status) VALUES (#{topic}, #{payload}, 0)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM t_outbox_message WHERE status = 0 AND retry_count < 5 ORDER BY created_at LIMIT 20
